business_hours: Actually, we decided to drop the Friday hours to end at 3 PM.
emergency_definition: Sparking panels, complete power loss, or exposed live wires.
emergency_routing_rules: If there's an emergency, route directly to my cell, 555-9999.
call_transfer_rules: If transfer fails, tell them to call 911 immediately if there is a fire risk, otherwise we will call them back in 15 minutes.
integration_constraints: Never schedule new breaker installations without an on-site quote first, tag all such jobs as 'Needs Review'.
after_hours_flow_summary: Route emergencies, take message for others
office_hours_flow_summary: Handle calls according to routing rules
